name: Vonage
mcp_notes: Vonage has released two official MCP servers: the Vonage Documentation MCP Server and the Vonage MCP Tooling Server.
auth_notes: Authentication typically involves API keys/secrets for server-side management and JWT-based tokens for individual sessions or client-side authentication.
api_notes: The platform provides a comprehensive suite of REST APIs supported by extensive server-side SDKs (Node, PHP, Java, .NET, Python, Ruby) and client-side SDKs.
access_notes: Developers can sign up for a free account on the Vonage Developer Portal, which includes free credits to evaluate the APIs.

evidence.claim: Vonage provides free developer accounts with evaluation credits to access their communications APIs.
Vonage offers official Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers for documentation and tooling.
The platform includes both REST APIs and comprehensive SDKs for various server and client environments.
Search citation: Getting Started with the Vonage Video API

one_liner: Vonage provides a suite of programmable communications APIs for integrating voice, messaging, video, and identity verification into applications.
